master.prompt: Create an image for Tellery, a premium interactive storytelling app. The image belongs to the story “O Relicário de Santa Luzia”, an elegant Brazilian-inspired literary mystery set inside the Museu Sacro Diocesano, a sacred-art museum annexed to an old cathedral (Sé Catedral), on the misty morning after a golden baroque reliquary of the city's patron saint is stolen from a locked display case on the eve of the patron-saint procession. Art direction: premium cinematic editorial illustration, semi-realistic digital painting, refined adult mystery, intimate literary atmosphere, sophisticated but calm, inquisitive rather than frightening, reverent rather than gory, not scary. The visual tone should feel like an interactive short story or a prestige streaming mystery, not like a traditional game. Setting identity: the Museu Sacro Diocesano is a stone-vaulted sacred-art museum with a long nave-like Hall of Reliquaries lined with dark jacaranda-and-glass display cases, stained-glass windows casting colored light shafts, a back restoration atelier with gilt tools and a procession float under repair, an adjacent cathedral sacristy with embroidered vestments and chalices, an elegant townhouse residence of the donor with an antique wall safe behind a wood panel, and a museum entrance corridor with a discreet security camera and an electronic alarm panel; the cathedral square is wrapped in soft dawn mist. Color palette: antique gold #B08A3E, deep scarlet velvet #5C1A1B, pale limestone #EDE6D3, dark jacaranda brown #3E2418, wax-white candle glow #F2EBDC, oxidized bronze #7A5A2A, stained-glass blue #2B3A5E, cold dawn gray shadow #3A3A3D, soft amber lamp light #C68A3E. Lighting: warm candle and amber lamp light against cool dawn window light, dramatic contrast between the warm gold of the reliquary and the cold gray stone, soft golden reflections on polished bronze and gilt wood, subtle film grain. Style: refined, polished, modern, premium, adult, literary, cinematic, semi-realistic, soft depth of field, elegant composition, believable materials, emotionally grounded realism. Recurring motifs: baroque reliquaries, gold ostensories, velvet-lined display cases, wax candles, stained-glass windows, embroidered vestments, antique iron safes, procession floats with gilt angels, brass keys, holy cards. Avoid horror, gore, blood, weapons, police crime-scene aesthetics, skulls (skull motifs on old religious art in the background are acceptable as period detail), monsters, childish illustration, cartoon style, anime, fantasy RPG visuals, game UI, neon cyberpunk, text overlays, logos, and watermarks.

cover.prompt: Create a wide cinematic cover image for the interactive mystery story “O Relicário de Santa Luzia”. Show the interior of the Hall of Reliquaries at the Museu Sacro Diocesano on a misty dawn morning. The main focus is the central display case under a vaulted stone arch at the back of the hall: a tall jacaranda-and-glass case with its inner door standing open and the scarlet velvet interior empty, where a golden baroque reliquary of Santa Luzia should be resting. On the velvet lies a slightly off-color lightweight replica, the central mystery detail, but the absence of the true gold reliquary should clearly read as the place where something sacred is missing. Around the hall: pale limestone walls, stained-glass windows casting colored light shafts across the stone floor, smaller reliquary cases along the side walls, and a few votive candles casting warm amber glow. Composition: wide horizontal hero-card framing for a mobile storytelling app. Place the open empty central display case slightly right of center. Leave darker atmospheric negative space on the left side for future app title and CTA overlay, but do not render any text overlay. Use the warm amber candle light against the cold blue stained-glass light to create drama and depth. Mood: refined, reverent, calm, inquisitive, literary, quietly mysterious, somber, inviting.

thumbnail.prompt: Create a cinematic close-up thumbnail for the interactive mystery story “O Relicário de Santa Luzia”. Show the open inner door of a dark jacaranda-and-glass display case, dominating the frame, with the scarlet velvet interior empty and a lightweight, slightly off-color replica of a golden baroque reliquary resting on it — clearly not the true gold piece. On the bronze guide rail of the case, a fresh scratch with a small red thread snagged on the metal catches the warm light, the central mystery detail. Around it, the stained-glass light and votive candle glow of the hall fill the background. Composition: square close-up still life, the open display case interior with the replica and the scratched bronze rail with the red thread is the clear focal point, strong focal hierarchy, shallow depth of field, high contrast between the warm gold of the replica, the scarlet velvet, and the cold stone. The empty case and the off-color replica should remain instantly readable as 'the sacred gold is missing' even at small mobile thumbnail size. Mood: refined, quiet, suspicious, reverent, elegant, literary, somber.

salao_relicarios.prompt: Create a cinematic location image for “Salão dos Relicários”, the central crime scene at the Museu Sacro Diocesano. Show a long nave-like hall of pale limestone with a vaulted stone ceiling, stained-glass windows casting colored light shafts across the floor, and rows of dark jacaranda-and-glass display cases along the side walls. At the back, under a vaulted arch, the central display case of Santa Luzia stands with its inner door open and the scarlet velvet interior empty, with a lightweight off-color replica left on the velvet. A few votive candles cast warm amber glow near the side cases. Composition: the open empty central case with the replica is the clear focal point, centered slightly off-axis at the back, with enough surrounding hall context to establish the location. Mood: quiet, suspicious, reverent, refined, investigative. Important visual clues: open inner door of the central case, empty scarlet velvet with the off-color replica, stained-glass light, votive candles, limestone vault.

atelier_restauro.prompt: Create a cinematic location image for “Atelier de restauro”, the back restoration workshop of the museum. Show a bright back room with wooden workbenches, magnifying loupes, jars of solvents, gilt tools, and at the center a gilt-wood procession float (andor) of Santa Luzia under repair, surrounded by cloths and gilding tools. There is a smell of varnish and beeswax, and shelves hold sacred-art pieces in various stages of conservation. Fresh gilding on the float is still wet, and tools have been recently used. Composition: medium-wide horizontal shot establishing the atelier as a sacred-art conservation workshop, with the procession float, the wet gilding, and the recently used tools noticeable enough to function as clues. Mood: warm, busy, professional, quietly suspicious. Important visual clues: gilt-wood procession float with fresh wet gilding, recently used gilding tools, conservation benches, solvent jars.

sacristia.prompt: Create a cinematic location image for “Sacristia da Sé”, the cathedral sacristy. Show a long room with dark wood cabinets, embroidered vestments on mannequin forms, polished chalices, and a strong smell of incense and wood. On a workbench rest the red-and-gold vestments of the Santa Luzia procession, still being pressed. Fresh iron-press marks and freshly cut threads on the vestments show recent night-time work. Composition: medium-wide horizontal shot establishing the sacristy as a working cathedral room, with the vestments, the iron-press marks, and the cut threads noticeable enough to function as clues. Mood: warm, traditional, reverent, quietly suspicious. Important visual clues: red-and-gold procession vestments, fresh iron-press marks, freshly cut threads, dark wood cabinets, chalices.

residencia_dante.prompt: Create a cinematic location image for “Residência de Dante”, the donor's elegant townhouse. Show a refined study lined with paintings and bookshelves, with an antique iron safe embedded in the wall behind a sliding wood panel, and a dark leather briefcase sitting open on a writing desk with a scarlet-red velvet lining. The house has the air of a seldom-inhabited residence, with sheet-draped furniture and a smell of wax and leather. Composition: medium-wide horizontal shot establishing the townhouse study, with the wall safe, the open red-lined briefcase, and the sheet-draped furniture noticeable enough to function as clues. Mood: elegant, restrained, quietly suspicious, wealthy, somber. Important visual clues: antique iron wall safe behind a wood panel, open dark leather briefcase with scarlet velvet lining, sheet-draped furniture, paintings.

corredor_museu.prompt: Create a cinematic location image for “Corredor de entrada do museu”, the museum entrance corridor. Show a tiled-floor corridor leading to the double doors of the Hall of Reliquaries, with an electronic alarm panel on the wall beside the doors and a discreet ceiling security camera pointing at the entrance. Through the windows, the cathedral square and the annexed residence where Beatriz lives are visible. A printed international airline ticket in the name of 'Dante' lies forgotten on the porter's desk by the camera. Composition: medium-wide horizontal shot establishing the corridor as the museum entrance, with the alarm panel, the security camera, and the forgotten printed airline ticket noticeable enough to function as clues. Mood: quiet, institutional, discreetly suspicious, investigative. Important visual clues: electronic alarm panel beside the doors, ceiling security camera, printed international airline ticket on the porter's desk, tiled floor, view of the cathedral square.

vitrine_central.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Vitrine central de Santa Luzia”, the central clue in the mystery. Show the inner door of a dark jacaranda-and-glass display case standing open, revealing a scarlet velvet interior that is empty except for a slightly off-color lightweight replica of a golden baroque reliquary resting on the velvet. The lock of the case is intact, with no sign of forced entry, and the internal quick-release mechanism is visibly disengaged. On the bronze guide rail of the case, a fresh scratch with a small red thread snagged on the metal catches the warm light, the central mystery detail. The stained-glass light and votive candle glow of the hall fill the background. Composition: close-up still life, the open case interior with the replica and the scratched bronze rail with the red thread dominates the frame, with realistic wood, velvet, glass, and bronze texture. Mood: intimate, suspicious, reverent, weighted, elegant, quiet, important.

replica_leve.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Réplica leve na vitrine”. Show a small religious reliquary-shaped object made of a light-colored metal alloy, sitting on scarlet velvet inside a display case, clearly lighter and less lustrous than antique gold. It mimics the shape of a baroque reliquary but lacks the weight, patina, and warm luster of the original. Marks of a specific mold and restoration gold paint on its surface hint at workshop fabrication. The velvet and the bronze rail of the case surround it. Composition: square close-up still life, the lightweight replica reliquary is the clear focal point, with realistic metal, paint, and velvet texture. Mood: quiet, suspicious, reverent, weighty, investigative. Important visual clues: light-alloy reliquary shape, restoration gold paint, mold marks, off-color compared to antique gold, scarlet velvet background.

andor_luzia.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Andor de Santa Luzia”. Show a gilt-wood procession float (andor) of Santa Luzia, with carved gilt angels and flowers, under repair in the restoration atelier, surrounded by cloths and gilding tools. The gilding is fresh and still wet in places, and gilding tools have been recently used. Composition: square close-up still life, the gilt-wood procession float with its wet fresh gilding and recently used tools is the clear focal point, with realistic gilt wood, cloth, and tool texture. Mood: warm, devotional, professional, quietly investigative. Important visual clues: gilt-wood procession float, fresh wet gilding, recently used gilding tools, carved gilt angels.

registro_visitas.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Registro de visitas e doações”. Show a black-covered record book lying open on the atelier workbench, with recent handwritten entries about visits, donations, and provenances of sacred-art pieces. Several entries in recent weeks record provenance and appraisal inquiries by a donor named 'Dante', annotated by a different hand with the margin note 'interesse incomum'. A fountain pen rests across the page, and a single warm lamp lights it. Composition: square close-up still life, the open record book with the donor inquiries and the 'interesse incomum' margin note is the main focus, with elegant paper texture and legible handwriting detail. Mood: orderly, calm, archival, investigative, quietly suspicious. Important visual clues: open record book, 'Dante' provenance inquiries, 'interesse incomum' margin note, fountain pen.

paramentos.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Paramentos da procissão”. Show the red-and-gold embroidered vestments of the Santa Luzia procession lying on a sacristy workbench, still being pressed. Fresh iron-press marks and freshly cut threads on the vestments show recent night-time work. A flatiron rests nearby, and the smell of hot cloth fills the air. Composition: square close-up still life, the vestments with the fresh iron-press marks and cut threads are the clear focal point, with realistic fabric, gold thread, and iron texture. Mood: warm, devotional, traditional, quietly investigative. Important visual clues: red-and-gold embroidered vestments, fresh iron-press marks, freshly cut threads, flatiron.

caixa_esmolas.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Caixa de esmolas”. Show a wooden alms box with a lid, labeled 'ESMOLAS', on a sacristy cabinet, with a folded debt-collection notice from an online gambling house peeking out from behind it, addressed to 'Irmão Geraldo', with a small amount and a deadline that has already been paid. The box is dusty and ordinary; the notice is creased and hastily hidden. Composition: square close-up still life, the alms box with the hidden gambling debt notice behind it is the clear focal point, with realistic wood, paper, and dust texture. Mood: quiet, devotional, grounded, quietly suspicious, investigative. Important visual clues: wooden alms box, ESMOLAS label, hidden gambling debt notice, name 'Irmão Geraldo', small paid amount.

cofre_dante.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Cofre de Dante”. Show an antique iron wall safe behind a sliding wood panel in an elegant study, its heavy door closed and locked. Around the keyhole, fresh wax residue from a candle drips, and the safe's mechanism area is faintly warm to the touch, suggesting it was opened and closed recently, in the early morning. The only known key sits in the pocket of a jacket draped on a chair nearby. Composition: square close-up still life, the antique wall safe with the fresh wax residue around the keyhole is the clear focal point, with realistic iron, wax, and wood texture. Mood: quiet, suspicious, elegant, weighty, investigative. Important visual clues: antique iron wall safe, fresh candle wax around the keyhole, sliding wood panel, jacket with the key nearby.

maleta_forrada.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Maleta forrada de vermelho”. Show a dark leather briefcase sitting open on a writing desk, with a scarlet-red velvet lining inside. A small tear in the velvet lining has a red thread peeking out, matching a red thread snagged on a distant display-case rail. The desk lamp casts warm amber light across the leather and velvet. Composition: square close-up still life, the open red-lined leather briefcase with the torn lining and peeking red thread is the clear focal point, with realistic leather, velvet, and thread texture. Mood: quiet, suspicious, elegant, weighty, investigative. Important visual clues: open dark leather briefcase, scarlet velvet lining, torn lining with red thread peeking out, desk lamp.

painel_alarme.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Painel de alarme”. Show an electronic alarm panel mounted on a wall beside a double door, with a small green screen displaying a chronological log of arm and disarm events. One entry clearly shows the alarm disarmed at 03:12 and rearmed at 03:31 in the early morning by a valid donor credential, without triggering. Small status LEDs glow green and amber beside the screen. Composition: square close-up still life, the alarm panel and its green screen with the donor-credential log are the clear focal point, with legible timestamps. Mood: quiet, technical, suspicious, weighty, investigative. Important visual clues: electronic alarm panel, green screen log, donor-credential disarm at 03:12 and rearm at 03:31, status LEDs.

camera_corredor.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Câmera do corredor”. Show a discreet ceiling security camera pointing at the museum entrance double doors, with a small status indicator. On the porter's desk beneath it, a printed international airline ticket in the name of 'Dante', departing two days after the procession, lies forgotten. The tiled floor and the double doors fill the background. Composition: square close-up still life, the ceiling camera and the forgotten printed airline ticket beneath it are the clear focal points, with realistic camera, paper, and tile texture. Mood: quiet, technical, institutional, suspicious, investigative. Important visual clues: ceiling security camera, printed international airline ticket, name 'Dante', departure date two days after the procession.

beatriz.prompt: Create a character portrait for Beatriz, the historian in charge of the Museu Sacro Diocesano. Beatriz is a Brazilian White woman in her mid-50s, fair skin with fine lines, silver-streaked dark brown hair in a neat low bun, and sharp hazel eyes behind thin rectangular reading glasses. She is methodical, devoted to the collection, and quietly proud, noticing small changes no one else sees. Appearance: a charcoal-gray blazer over a cream blouse, a thin gold chain with a small cross, a wristwatch, and a lanyard with museum keys. Her expression is composed, dignified, quietly wounded, with the set mouth of someone whose trust has been betrayed. Composition: vertical bust or upper-body portrait, the museum hall with display cases and stained-glass light softly blurred behind her, with warm amber lamp light and cool stained-glass blue on her face. She should look human, believable, dignified, and clearly distinct in age and bearing from every other character. Mood: methodical dignity, quiet hurt, protective scholarship, guarded trust.

inacio.prompt: Create a character portrait for Monsenhor Inácio, the parish priest of the Sé Catedral and keeper of the master keys. Inácio is a Brazilian White man in his mid-60s, fair skin with deep lines, silver-gray hair receding at the temples, and calm dark brown eyes. He is formal, uncompromising in faith, and protective of the sacred patrimony. Appearance: a black clerical shirt with a white collar, a dark purple stole draped over the shoulders, a small pectoral cross on a chain, and a wristwatch. On his belt hangs a large ring of antique brass keys. His expression is solemn, dignified, quietly stern, with the composed mouth of a long-serving priest. Composition: vertical bust or upper-body portrait, the cathedral interior with candles and stone softly blurred behind him, with warm candle glow and cool stained-glass blue on his face. He should look human, believable, dignified, and clearly distinct in age and bearing from every other character. Mood: solemn authority, protective faith, quiet resolve, guarded trust.

sueli.prompt: Create a character portrait for Sueli, the restorer of the sacred art. Sueli is a Brazilian Parda (mixed-race) woman in her early 40s, warm tan skin with laugh lines, dark brown eyes, and thick wavy dark hair pulled back in a practical low ponytail under a dust cap. She is meticulous, talented, and quietly exhausted, feeling her work is invisible. Appearance: a cream work smock over a dark t-shirt, canvas gloves hanging from a pocket, a magnifying loupe on a cord around the neck, a wristwatch, and traces of gold restoration paint on her fingertips. Her expression is focused, tired, professionally composed, with a faint thread of resentment around the eyes. Composition: vertical bust or upper-body portrait, the restoration atelier with gilt tools and the procession float softly blurred behind her, with warm work-lamp light and cool window light. She should look human, believable, professionally careful, and clearly distinct in age, ethnicity, and role from every other character. Mood: meticulous care, quiet exhaustion, professional pride, hidden resentment.

geraldo.prompt: Create a character portrait for Irmão Geraldo, the cathedral sacristan and museum beadle. Geraldo is a Brazilian Afro-descendant man in his late 50s, deep brown skin with deep laugh lines, a short neatly trimmed gray beard, and warm dark brown eyes, with close-cropped gray hair. He is devout, practical, and quietly burdened by a small private debt. Appearance: a dark brown lay brother's tunic with a simple cord belt, a crucifix on a cord around the neck, a wristwatch, and a large ring of brass keys at the belt. His expression is humble, reverent, watchful, with a faint worry behind the eyes. Composition: vertical bust or upper-body portrait, the sacristy with vestments and chalices softly blurred behind him, with warm candle glow and cool stone shadow. He should look warm, grounded, believable, devout, and clearly distinct in age, ethnicity, and role from every other character. Mood: devout humility, quiet worry, practical faith, watchful innocence.

dante.prompt: Create a character portrait for Dante, the principal donor of the collection and a benefactor of the diocese. Dante is a Brazilian light-skinned Mestizo man in his early 60s, light tan skin with refined features, silver-gray hair swept back, a trim silver beard, and shrewd pale hazel eyes. He is cultivated, outwardly generous, and quietly calculating, hiding a merchant's eye behind the benefactor. Appearance: an elegant charcoal pinstripe suit with a burgundy silk tie, a gold signet ring, a white pocket square, a wristwatch, and yellow cotton gloves held in one hand. A faint sheen of gold dust glints on the cuff and glove, the central mystery detail. His expression is composed, affable, polished, with an appraising gaze and a courteous smile that doesn't quite reach the eyes. Composition: vertical bust or upper-body portrait, his elegant townhouse study with paintings and the wall safe softly blurred behind him, with warm amber lamplight and cool window light. He should look sophisticated, believable, cultivated, and clearly distinct in age, ethnicity, and bearing from every other character. Mood: cultivated beneficence, hidden calculation, restrained defensiveness, courteous menace.

full_truth.prompt: Create a cinematic ending image for the full truth ending of “O Relicário de Santa Luzia”. Show the Hall of Reliquaries at the Museu Sacro Diocesano after the mystery is resolved, now quiet under stained-glass light. The central display case stands closed, and on the scarlet velvet inside rests the recovered golden baroque reliquary of Santa Luzia, gently returned, with a votive candle burning beside it. On a side bench, a torn red-lined briefcase lining and an antique wall-safe key sit as evidence no longer threatening. The atmosphere feels calmer, warmer, and more reflective, with amber candle light and stained-glass blue. Composition: wide horizontal image, no people, focus on the recovered reliquary in the closed case and the votive candle as symbols of resolution. Mood: reflective, reverent, resolved, bittersweet, elegant, literary, somber hope.

partial_truth.prompt: Create a cinematic ending image for the partial truth ending of “O Relicário de Santa Luzia”. Show the Hall of Reliquaries with the central display case still open, the scarlet velvet still empty, and the off-color lightweight replica still resting on it. The torn red-lined briefcase lining and the antique wall-safe key appear softly blurred at the edges of the image, surrounded by deeper shadows and uncertainty. The hall remains warm and reverent, but the borders of the image are darker and less resolved. Composition: wide horizontal image, focus on the open empty case with the replica, with deeper shadows around the frame and partial evidence at the edges. No characters. Mood: ambiguous, reverent, elegant, unresolved, quiet discomfort, somber.

wrong_accusation.prompt: Create a cinematic ending image for the wrong accusation ending of “O Relicário de Santa Luzia”. Show the Hall of Reliquaries after the wrong conclusion has been accepted, with the central display case still open and the off-color replica still on the scarlet velvet. The true reliquary is still missing and the truth has not been found; a votive candle burns down indifferently near the case, and a wax-pool forms on the stone. The lighting is warm but heavier with shadows, and the atmosphere suggests that the real culprit walked away into a calm, indifferent morning. Composition: wide horizontal image, focus on the open case with the off-color replica slightly off-center, surrounded by votive candles, deeper shadows, and the indifferently melting candle, no characters. Mood: unresolved, quiet, reverent, regretful, elegant, literary, somber indifference.
